title: Insecure API Design Leading to Privilege Escalation
description: If the system utilizes APIs without proper authorization checks, attackers could exploit vulnerabilities to gain elevated privileges. This could allow them to perform actions that require administrative access or access sensitive data.
attack_vector: Exploitation of vulnerabilities in the API design or implementation, allowing attackers to bypass authorization checks and gain elevated privileges.
mitigations: Implement robust authorization checks for all API requests.
Follow the principle of least privilege, granting users only the minimum necessary permissions.
Regularly audit API logs for suspicious activity and unauthorized access attempts.
